User Story
As an exporter

I need the add your reference page updated

So that I can see clearer guidance text

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - Info text added

Given I have navigated to the /add-your-reference in my processing statement journey

When the page loads

Then under the page header is information text of “This information will not appear on the processing statement.” in bold and with the exclamation logo to the left of it 

 

Scenario 2 - Your reference field updated

Given I have navigated to the /add-your-reference in my processing statement journey

When the page loads

Then the field ‘Your reference (optional)’ is in bold

And the guidance text underneath the field label is “This reference is for your own records. For example, you might use an internal tracking number, project code, or any label that makes sense for your organisation.”

 

Scenario 3 - Welsh translations

Given I have navigated to the /add-your-reference in my processing statement journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the guidance text is translated to Welsh

English text

Welsh translation

This information will not appear on the processing statement.

Ni fydd yr wybodaeth yma yn ymddangos ar y datganiad prosesu.

This reference is for your own records. For example, you might use an internal tracking number, project code, or any label that makes sense for your organisation.

Cyfeirnod ar gyfer eich cofnodion chi’ch hun yw hwn. Er enghraifft, efallai y byddwch chi'n defnyddio rhif olrhain mewnol, cod prosiect, neu unrhyw label sy'n gwneud synnwyr i'ch sefydliad.

 

Scenario 4 - Changes reflected when navigating from Admin app

Given I have navigated to the /add-your-reference in my processing statement journey

When I navigate to /add-your-reference 

Then the changes mentioned in scenario 1 & scenario 2 are present
